title: HIVE Digital Technologies (HIVE) Reports Q3 Loss, Tops Revenue Estimates
text: HIVE Digital Technologies posted revenues of $29.23 million for the quarter ended December 2024, surpassing the Zacks Consensus Estimate by 10.32%. On the earnings per share front, HIVE Digital Technologies came out with a quarterly loss of $0.06 per share versus the Zacks Consensus Estimate of a loss of $0.11. This quarterly report represents an earnings surprise of 45.45%. HIVE mined 322 BTC during the quarter, bringing its total Bitcoin holdings to 2,805 BTC, valued at approximately $260.8 million. HIVE turned a net income of $1.3 million, reversing a $7 million loss from the prior year. CEO Aydin Kilic outlined the company's aggressive expansion in Paraguay, targeting a fourfold increase in hash rate to 25 EH/s by September 2025.
